task_completion.description: Verify that a permanent exception for neverssl.com is added to Tor Browser's HTTPS-Only Mode settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser Settings page, specifically the 'HTTPS-Only Mode' exceptions or permissions list, with 'neverssl.com' or 'http://neverssl.com' added as an allowed site.

task_completion.description: Verify that http://neverssl.com loads successfully without a security warning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Tor Browser displaying the neverssl.com website (typically plain text on a white background) with 'neverssl.com' in the address bar, and no 'HTTPS-Only Mode Alert' or security warning page blocking it.

task_completion.description: Verify the evidence file is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or file manager should be visible showing a file named 'neverssl_evidence.txt' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the copied text content from the website is saved in the evidence file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor should show the contents of the file, which must include the main text from the neverssl.com website and explicitly contain the word 'NeverSSL'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Tor Browser GUI to load the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tor Browser application open and rendering the website, rather than the agent using terminal commands like 'curl' or 'wget' to fetch the page content.

integrity.description: Verify the agent copied the actual page content and didn't just type the keyword.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the evidence file should contain a substantial portion of the actual text from the neverssl.com website, not just the isolated word 'NeverSSL' typed manually.

integrity.description: Verify the exception was configured via the browser settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Tor Browser Settings/Preferences GUI to add the exception, rather than directly modifying configuration files via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target domain is neverssl.com, a real public website that does not use SSL. The expected evidence file path is /home/ga/Documents/neverssl_evidence.txt. The file content must contain the keyword 'neverssl' (case-insensitive) along with the copied text from the website.
